basicInfo.name: Randgrid
basicInfo.flavor: Randgrid's younger sister made a triumphant comeback as a battlefield commander, but refused to reclaim the title of successor. Her reasoning revealed a dangerous secret, but she encouraged and affirmed her older sister, who had always dedicated herself to the family, as the true successor.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 130% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Promised Battlefield
Skill 1.desc:
3 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 145% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Block Rate Reduction. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Self
 - Grants Weakness Hit Damage Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - 3 Enemies
 - Adds Effect: 100% chance to inflict 25% Block Rate Reduction. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]

Skill 2.name: Undefeated Cavalier
Skill 2.desc:
1 Enemy (Front Row First)
 - Starting battles with at least 5 Attack hero(es) on your team grants 32% HP Alteration.
 - Deals Piercing damage equal to 76% of Physical Attack 4 time(s).
 - Each attack deals additional Piercing damage equal to 91% of Physical Attack when the target's Attack is lower than the caster's Attack.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 101% of Physical Attack.
Transcend Lv.6 Effect
 - Adds Effect: Resets the cooldown of [Undefeated Cavalier] upon defeating an enemy with damage from this skill.

Passive.name: Unrivaled Heroism
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants All Damage Immunity. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Revives with Indomitable upon falling in battle. [Ends After: Taking 8 Hit(s)] [Once per Battle]
 - Increases Indomitable effect's hit count by 1 hit(s) upon using a skill 1 time(s).
 - All Allies
 - Grants All Debuff Removal (Crowd Control) upon being inflicted with Crowd Control. [Once per Battle]
 - Grants Crowd Control Immunity when a debuff is removed. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - All Enemies
 - Inflicts Defense Reduction. [Always Active]
 - Inflicts Block Rate Reduction. [Always Active]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - All Enemies
 - Increases Effect: Defense Reduction to 24%.
 - Increases Effect: Block Rate Reduction to 23%.
Transcend Lv.2 Effect
 - Self
 - Adds Effect: 39% Weakness Hit Chance Boost. [Always Active]

transcendence.transcend_7: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_8: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_9: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_10: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_11: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_12: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.

profile.likes: Radgrid, Reginleif, Trude, her favorite spear, martial arts, strength, travel
profile.dislikes: Restraint, weakness, passiveness, spending a lot of time on meals
profile.story: Randgrid's younger sister made a triumphant comeback as a battlefield commander, but refused to reclaim the title of successor. Her reasoning revealed a dangerous secret, but she encouraged and affirmed her older sister, who had always dedicated herself to the family, as the true successor.

basicInfo.name: Randgrid
basicInfo.flavor: Randgrid did her utmost to uphold her family's reputation as the heir. Fighting valiantly on the front lines, she led countless battles to victory and stood among the ranks of young heroes, yet her father remained cold and distant.

Single Enemy

Skill Enhancement Effect

 - Increases Damage: To 68% of Physical Attack.

basicInfo.name: Randgrid
basicInfo.flavor: As the illegitimate daughter of a martial arts master, Randgrid is recognized for her innate talent despite having only one eye. She engages in an unwanted battle for succession with her legitimate younger sister. Ultimately, she claims the title of heir after her sister is injured during a match.
